visa_types.name: Short-Term Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Please find the below guidance that is suitable to your purpose of travel.
*Note①: Please ensure that passport must not be broken, damaged or soiled and has 2 blank pages.
*Note②: If your visa category require marriage certificate/birth certificate, please prepare original language certificate + English translation.
*Note③: Please arrange your documents in the order according to the checklist.

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]
visa_types.visa_fees:
You must pay the applicable Visa fee (https://www.sg.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_en/visa_fees.html) and Service charge when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Japan. Please refer to the table below to know your visa fees: 

[jpn > sgp > en > visa fees ]
*Fees are subject to change without prior notice. We will follow the price rate in the day you actually submit your application. Price difference will be collected at the VAC on your appoitment date.
For any further information, please click here (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Value-Adde Services:
The value-added services are optional items. Availing these services will not impact the processing time or result of your application.
For the fee and details, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/jpn/additional-services).
Please note that the VFS service fee and value-added service fee are non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not.
Please note that as per the refund policy, below rule applies:
1. Services must be cancelled at least 3 business days prior to the date scheduled for an appointment for a visa and proof of the cancellation must be submitted together with the Refund Request Form.
2. If the appointment is cancelled in less than 3 business days, the service fee is non-refundable.
3. Please refer to Refund Policy (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/jpn/refund-policy) for more information.
visa_types.processing_time:
The visa application process takes a minimum of 10 business days from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Embassy of Japan in Singapore).
Depending on the travel purpose or individual circumstances, more time may be required for visa approval to be granted.
Besides, please note that the visa application process will begin only once we have received all the required documents from the applicant. If any additional documents are needed, this may result in a longer processing time.
We do not accept any expedite requests.
The applicant needs to submit his/her passport during the entire visa application process. Should the applicant need his/her passport urgently, please withdraw the visa application to be able to return the passport.
visa_types.forms: [jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Download Forms]
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visitor visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing, business and visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances.
Transit visa is for those who are stopping over in Japan while en route to another country due to flight schedules.
All the above purposes of journey to Japan shall exclude any activities engaging or involving the management of business or remuneration.
Please only apply for a visa within 3 months of your intended travel date.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visitor visa is for those who are visiting Japan up to 90 days for purposes of sightseeing, business and visits relatives, friends, or acquaintances.
Transit visa is for those who are stopping over in Japan while en route to another country due to flight schedules.
All the above purposes of journey to Japan shall exclude any activities engaging or involving the management of business or remuneration.
Please only apply for a visa within 3 months of your intended travel date.

## Visa Fees
You must pay the applicable Visa fee (https://www.sg.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_en/visa_fees.html) and Service charge when submitting your application. The Visa fees are determined based on your Nationality and Type of Entry to Japan. Please refer to the table below to know your visa fees: 

[jpn > sgp > en > visa fees ]
*Fees are subject to change without prior notice. We will follow the price rate in the day you actually submit your application. Price difference will be collected at the VAC on your appoitment date.
For any further information, please click here (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/short/novisa.html#notice02).
Value-Adde Services:
The value-added services are optional items. Availing these services will not impact the processing time or result of your application.
For the fee and details, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/jpn/additional-services).
Please note that the VFS service fee and value-added service fee are non-refundable regardless of whether your application is approved or not.
Please note that as per the refund policy, below rule applies:
1. Services must be cancelled at least 3 business days prior to the date scheduled for an appointment for a visa and proof of the cancellation must be submitted together with the Refund Request Form.
2. If the appointment is cancelled in less than 3 business days, the service fee is non-refundable.
3. Please refer to Refund Policy (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sgp/en/jpn/refund-policy) for more information.

## Documents Required
Please find the below guidance that is suitable to your purpose of travel.
*Note①: Please ensure that passport must not be broken, damaged or soiled and has 2 blank pages.
*Note②: If your visa category require marriage certificate/birth certificate, please prepare original language certificate + English translation.
*Note③: Please arrange your documents in the order according to the checklist.

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Documents Required]

## Photo Specifications
Please submit passport-size colour photo(s) along with your visa application. The photograph must be:
- Not more than 6 months old.
- Photograph should not be used in any of the previous visa or any ID.
- 45mm x 35 mm or 2inch x 1.4inch
- Coloured, with plain White background.
- Hair should be tied & no spectacles
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly. (70% face coverage)
- No outline border in the photograph.
- Photos with Glossy finish, printed in photo paper, not in A4 bond paper.

Note*: The application may be cancelled if the submitted photograph is older than six months or does not meet the required specifications.

## Processing Time
The visa application process takes a minimum of 10 business days from the date of submission (excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays announced by the Embassy of Japan in Singapore).
Depending on the travel purpose or individual circumstances, more time may be required for visa approval to be granted.
Besides, please note that the visa application process will begin only once we have received all the required documents from the applicant. If any additional documents are needed, this may result in a longer processing time.
We do not accept any expedite requests.
The applicant needs to submit his/her passport during the entire visa application process. Should the applicant need his/her passport urgently, please withdraw the visa application to be able to return the passport.

## Download Forms
[jpn > sgp > en > Short-Term Visit > Download Forms]

visa_types.name: Others
visa_types.documents_required:
- Please find the below guidance that is suitable to your purpose of travel.
*Note①: Please ensure that passport must not be broken, damaged or soiled and has 2 blank pages.
*Note②: If your visa category require marriage certificate/birth certificate, please prepare original language certificate + English translation.
*Note③: Please arrange your documents in the order according to the checklist.
- Holders of COE (Certificate of Eligibility) 

Click here
*Note①: Foreigners who would like to perform remunerative work in Japan or for long term stays over 90 days in Japan etc, which are for purposes other than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.
*Note②: Submission of original COE is not required. You may submit COE copy for visa application. Click here (https://www.moj.go.jp/isa/applications/procedures/10_00136.html) for more details.
- Medical Stay 
Click here (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/medical_stay1.html)
*Note: Copy of Valid IC / Long-term Pass issued by Singapore government + SGWorkPass app reading (for applicable pass holders) are required.

- Future Creation Individual (J-Find) / Digital Nomad
Future Creation Individual (J-Find) (https://www.mofa.go.jp/ca/fna/page22e_001037.html) 
Digital Nomad (https://www.mofa.go.jp/ca/fna/pagewe_000001_00046.html)
*Note①: Copy of Valid IC / Long-term Pass issued by Singapore government + SGWorkPass app reading (for applicable pass holders) are required.
*Note②:Indonesian non-IC passport holders are not eligible to apply Digital Nomads Visa.
*Note③:Future Creation Individual (J-Find) visa application process takes 1 - 2 months from the date of submission.
- Designated activities (Long Stay for sightseeing and recreation)

- Spouse of Japanese National
 English 
 Japanese

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for the Mid and Long Term Residents of Japan.
- Holders of COE (Certificate of Eligibility)
- Medical Stay
- Future Creation Individual (J-Find) / Digital Nomad
- Designated activities (Long Stay for sightseeing and recreation)
- Spouse of Japanese Nationals
Please only apply for a visa within 3 months of your intended travel date.
visa_types.full_text:

- Holders of COE (Certificate of Eligibility)
